---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Include any UI mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Roadmap Alignment

Which phase does this fit into?
- [ ] Phase 2 — Links (wiki-links, backlinks, graph, search)
- [ ] Phase 3 — Polish (themes, templates, daily notes)
- [ ] Phase 4 — Plugins
- [ ] Phase 5 — Canvas
- [ ] Other / New

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or prior art (e.g. how Obsidian handles this).
